fields.acceptance_criteria: 1. The shared workflow layer derives upstream blocker trees and downstream unlock trees while preserving direct parent-child structure at every level. 2. Each node carries frontier leaf counts, frontier leaf ids, blocker distance, and the ranking metadata needed to order nested sibling sets. 3. Tree helpers expose both the full nested tree and the leaf or frontier summaries needed for quick operator navigation. 4. Focused unit tests lock nested derivation and sibling ordering behavior.
fields.title: [ticket-api] Derive blocker and unlock trees with frontier leaf metrics
